task: Fixed two critical bugs in session direction inference: excluded metadata lines from blockers.md signal parsing, and corrected git momentum signal to properly detect commit hashes using regex instead of character matching that was masking askr/ file paths.
discussion_summary: Session focused on debugging the _infer_direction() function's three signals (blockers.md, git momentum, checkpoint card). Discovered Signal 1 was filtering out valid blocker content due to overly broad line matching, and Signal 3's commit-line detection was using `line[0] in hex_digits` which accidentally skipped all askr/ paths (since 'a' is hex). Both fixes were validated with direct Python tests, committed, and verified end-to-end. All four next_actions from previous handover were resolved.

accomplishments.what: Fixed blockers.md signal to exclude only actual metadata lines (Last updated, [None]) while preserving blocker content
Fixed git momentum signal to use regex for commit-line detection, restoring visibility of askr/ file changes
Validated full _infer_direction() inference chain with clean state post-fixes
Verified checkpoint card rendering without errors

next_actions.why: Phase 3.13 roadmap requires stress-testing before moving to HITL direction_confirm gate validation

next_actions.action: Test direction_confirm notification triggers when inference confidence < 0.70 in staging environment
next_actions.why: Open goal from previous session; validates HITL gate is firing correctly

next_actions.why: Open goal from previous session; ensures handover metadata is accurate

next_actions.action: Review Phase 3.13 roadmap and confirm all signal detection logic is production-ready before merging to main
next_actions.why: Direction inference is foundational to autonomous session continuity; needs final validation before wider deployment

decisions.decision: Used regex `^[0-9a-f]{7}` to detect commit hash lines instead of character-based matching
decisions.reason: Character matching was too broad and masked legitimate file paths starting with hex digits

decisions.decision: Excluded only 'Last updated' and '[None]' metadata from blockers.md signal, not all lines containing those substrings
decisions.reason: Preserves actual blocker content while filtering noise

failed_approaches.approach: Using `line[0] in '0123456789abcdef'` to skip commit hash lines in git log
failed_approaches.reason: Also skipped all file paths starting with 'a' (askr/), making momentum signal blind to primary codebase changes

failed_approaches.approach: Filtering blockers.md lines containing 'Last' or '[None]' substrings
failed_approaches.reason: Removed valid blocker content that happened to mention those words

relational_files.why: Signal 1 source; format changes affect inference accuracy
Uses _infer_direction() output for checkpoint card rendering

completed_goals: Test direction_confirm notification triggers when confidence < 0.70
